function k(k)return c[k-(-662529+701509)]end for k,D in ipairs({{-345837-(-345838),-647386-(-650880)},{-887271-(-887272);137345-133919},{283117-279690;-563045-(-566539)}})do while D[-50194-(-50195)]<D[-577299-(-577301)]do
